eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Virgin Islands of The United States; at 8:34 AM on SEP 27, 2019 Effective until 9:34 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required monthly test of the VI Emergency Alert System.  You are advised to participate in the Great ShakeOut Earthquake Drill on October 17. For info & to register visit shakeout.org/register. This is only a test.
